title: Theater featured in EoE shut down
display_title: Theater featured in EoE shut down
wikitext:
[]: Theater featured in EoE shut down             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 30, 2014 5:50 pm Related to this topic: https://forum.evageeks.org/thread/17045/Plushes-in-EoE-Theater-Scene/ Pretty interesting stuff: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Tue Dec 30, 2014 6:10 pm .... i shouldn't care about this as much as i do but..........why.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Tue Dec 30, 2014 7:49 pm Suddenly the recent thread about this scene is bittersweet.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Dec 30, 2014 8:46 pm Sadness. I might need to play that live-action sequence on a loop for a while, now.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Dec 30, 2014 8:51 pm And it all comes back to the beginning. That's a nice way to tie the new Eva in with the old, I think.
